channel.title: Artificial Intelligence - divergences
channel.description: Recent content in Artificial Intelligence on divergences

item.title: How to be optimistic about AI
item.description: It’s easy to be scared about AI. Not about those – I hesitate too choose a qualifier, lest it sound too mean – fantasies that AI could grow to take over the world and have nothing more useful to do than destroy humanity. I wouldn’t want it to sound mean because it’s not the fear that deserves to be deconstructed (assuming some people really have such a fear), – it’s the psychology of those who create it.

item.title: The hard problem of privacy
item.description: We live in a world of ever-diminishing privacy and ever-increasing surveillance - and this is a statement not just about openly-authoritarian regimes. Yet, we seem not to care that much, at least not until, for whatever reasons, we are personally affected by some negative consequence. This post wants to help increase awareness, casting a spotlight on recent history and also, letting words speak for themselves: Because nothing, to me, is less revealing than the "visions" that underly the actions.
